title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, generate, embed, pull, list and delete models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same API surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as standard LangChain LLMs and embedders.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Clean open-source ChatGPT-style web UI that talks to a local Ollama instance over its REST API.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-built interactive CLI wrapper with syntax highlighting, prompts library and TUI chat.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement for inline completions.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama providing synchronous & asynchronous APIs with POJO mapping.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Async-first Rust crate that wraps the Ollama REST API with strong typing and Tokio streams.

title: ollama-go
summary: Community Go client generated from OpenAPI specs; covers chat, generate, pull, delete and embeddings.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Official Docker image and compose stacks (CPU & GPU) for running Ollama in containers.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart that deploys Ollama on Kubernetes with optional GPU node-selector and autoscaling.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Curated recipes showing how to run Ollama with LangChain, LlamaIndex, Autogen, Docker, GPU, etc.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Electron desktop app that wraps Ollama REST endpoints into a native chat window.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG starter that combines Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store for question-answering.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that lets servers chat with any local Ollama model via slash commands.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt app that listens in channels/DMs and replies using an Ollama backend; supports streaming.

title: ollama-npm
summary: Official npm package providing typed JS/TS bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama PyPI package
summary: Official Python client published to PyPI; same feature set as the GitHub repo.
